tool.name: fastan
tool.description: FASTAN tandem-repeat arrays as content-annotated BED6
tool.command: set -o pipefail && #if str($input.ext) == 'fasta.gz' gunzip -c '$input' #else cat '$input' #end if | awk '/^>/{print;next}{print toupper(\$0)}' > in.fa && /data/galaxy_local/bin/FAtoGDB in.fa gdb || true ; /data/galaxy_local/bin/FasTAN -m -p -T\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4} gdb && /data/galaxy_local/bin/ANOtoBED gdb.1ano | grep -v '^#' | awk -f '$__tool_directory__/ano2bed6.awk' | LC_ALL=C sort -k1,1 -k2,2n > '$output'
tool.help: **FASTAN** (Gene Myers) — tandem-array finder. Detects tandem repeats and partitions them into units. Emitted as **BED6**: name = ``u<unit_size>`` (tandem unit length), score = unit identity (0-1000 grayscale), strand = real orientation. Complementary to the DUST/low-complexity tracks. Pipeline: ``FAtoGDB`` -> ``FasTAN -m -p`` (.1ano) -> ``ANOtoBED``. Input is upper-cased first.
